title: TE Connectivity: Connecting The World One Step At A Time
text: TE Connectivity Ltd. is well-positioned for growth due to the move towards electrification, AI, and renewable energy, as well as its global presence in high growth markets like China. The company's diverse business segments and strong geographical exposure provide stability and potential for capturing market share from smaller regional players. TE Connectivity's stock offers an attractive annualized return using my model of around 10%, including dividends, making it a solid long-term investment.
